title: Design System: Meridian — Permit Package Tracker

title.purpose: Page titles and client names; the largest text in the app.

label.purpose: Pills, chips, metadata, form labels; tabular numerals via .tnum for data.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Overlay tier only — slide-in panels, dialogs.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Rare ambient lift; never on resting content.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Steel-teal filled action button — one per view.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.25" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>New package</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 210); padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.875rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.49 0.095 210); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.091 210); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered white button for status moves and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.235 0.018 230); padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.80 0.012 220); border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.875rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 140ms, color 140ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); color: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.091 210); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Permit lifecycle status — icon + label + tinted hue, never color alone.
components.html: Corrections
components.css: .ds-pill-corrections { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 2px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.55 0.13 45); background: oklch(0.955 0.030 55); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field with hover and focus treatments.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Company or contractor name" />
components.css: .ds-input { padding: 8px 11px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.80 0.012 220); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.235 0.018 230); font: 400 0.875rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; width: 280px; transition: border-color 140ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.47 0.022 225); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.091 210); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Top Nav Link
components.description: Pill-shaped nav link; teal-on-teal-soft when current.
components.html: PackagesContractorsChecklists
components.css: .ds-topnav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-topnav-link { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font: 400 0.875rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.47 0.022 225); text-decoration: none; transition: color 140ms, background 140ms; } .ds-topnav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.235 0.018 230); background: oklch(0.972 0.004 220); } .ds-topnav-link.is-active { color: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); background: oklch(0.945 0.022 210); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: File Chip
components.description: Attached document chip — download affordance, tabular size, quiet remove.
components.css: .ds-file-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; border: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.008 220); border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.972 0.004 220); overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-file-chip-name { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 3px 4px 3px 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.235 0.018 230); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 140ms, color 140ms; } .ds-file-chip-name:hover { color: oklch(0.55 0.091 210); background: oklch(0.945 0.022 210); } .ds-file-chip-size { color: oklch(0.60 0.018 225); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-file-chip-x { border: none; background: none; padding: 0 8px 0 5px; color: oklch(0.60 0.018 225); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-file-chip-x:hover { color: oklch(0.52 0.16 25); background: oklch(0.955 0.025 25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Resting work surface — hairline border, no shadow.
components.html:
Document checklist

Hairline-bordered, flat at rest, 12px radius, 20px padding.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.008 220); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; max-width: 320px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-h { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.235 0.018 230); } .ds-card-p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.47 0.022 225); }

narrative.overview: Meridian is a precision instrument for permit expeditors: a tool that always knows exactly where things stand, and never looks anxious saying so. The system reads as cool steel-blue against pure white — the calm of a navigator's bench, not the noise of a SaaS dashboard. Information is dense but breathes; rows and lists carry the work, color carries meaning, and nothing decorates.
keyCharacteristics: Pure white surface; brand lives in steel-teal primary and brass accent
List-led layouts, not card grids; density without noise
Status is always icon + label + color — never color alone
Fixed rem type scale (~1.125 ratio), one family (Inter), tabular numerals for data
Motion only conveys state: 140–200ms, ease-out, no choreography

rules.name: The Brass-Means-Deadline Rule
rules.body: The brass accent appears only where time pressure exists — deadlines, overdue states, the attention strip. Brass on anything else is forbidden.

rules.name: The Never-Color-Alone Rule
rules.body: Status is always carried by icon + label + color together. A color-blind expeditor reads every screen at full fidelity.

rules.name: The Tabular Number Rule
rules.body: Every reference number, date, count, and file size uses tabular numerals. Data columns never wiggle.

rules.name: The Hairline-Structure Rule
rules.body: If you reach for a shadow to separate two resting surfaces, use a 1px border instead.

dos: Do keep the body background exactly oklch(1 0 0) in light mode — warmth belongs to brass and copy, never the surface.
Do pair every status color with its icon and label (The Never-Color-Alone Rule).
Do use .tnum tabular numerals on every reference, date, count, and size.
Do keep transitions 140–200ms ease-out, state-conveying only, with the prefers-reduced-motion kill switch already in globals.
Do use list rows for collections of packages and contractors; cards only for the detail page's distinct work areas.
donts: Don't drift toward the generic SaaS dashboard — interchangeable blue/white, sidebar nav, identical card grids.
Don't import construction-management-tool heaviness — Procore/Autodesk enterprise chrome.
Don't go overly minimal / cold — sterile whitespace deserts with no warmth.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or glassmorphism — banned outright.
Don't put brass on anything that isn't a deadline or attention signal.
Don't add shadows to resting surfaces; reach for a hairline border instead.
